entries.title: chore：发布部署流水线支持 tag 触发与环境变量同步提醒
entries.author: ArielZhu
summary: chore：发布部署流水线支持 tag 触发与环境变量同步提醒
ops: 发布工作流在打 tag、创建 GitHub Release 之后自动触发部署，避免受保护分支推送不触发下游
部署工作流支持手动指定 tag 触发，便于回滚或定向重发
PR 合并后在变更记录中标记环境变量相关文件，提示生产侧手动同步
verification: pnpm run ci:check 通过：216 suites / 2515 tests

entries.title: feat：测试套件验证流程增强 + 数据集策展硬闸门
entries.author: ArielZhu
summary: feat：测试套件验证流程增强 + 数据集策展硬闸门
features: 测试套件新增校验标题字段，前端重写复核弹窗、执行详情与对话列表组件
测试批次导入与回写飞书的服务链路完善
optimizations: 收紧 badcase 数据集策展规则
verification: 测试环境已应用 validation_title 字段迁移
Dashboard 测试套件列表 / 执行详情 / 对话复核弹窗回归通过

entries.title: feat：Agent 思考/工具/回复链可视化重放与运营视角文档
entries.author: ArielZhu
summary: feat：Agent 思考/工具/回复链可视化重放与运营视角文档
features: Agent 响应快照持久化，前端在执行详情按思考链 → 工具调用 → 回复链单一来源还原
新增运营/产品视角的 Agent 运行时与工作流文档，并与研发版架构文档交叉链接
optimizations: 批次状态机放开 completed → reviewing，支持单条重跑后重新评审
verification: pnpm run test:ci 通过：216 suites / 2526 tests
pnpm run lint:check / format:check / typecheck 全部通过

entries.title: [codex] improve hosting ops and feedback flows
entries.author: ArielZhu
summary: fix WeCom image/text merge handling and booking/dashboard stats recording
improve the users hosting operations page with search, stable sorting, bot filtering, and real configured bot data
add Good/Bad feedback from the message-processing drawer, including Batch ID write-through to Feishu
make feedback success and failure states much more visible, including backend error details
refine pending release notes and deploy notification markdown
fixes: fix WeCom image/text merge handling and booking/dashboard stats recording
optimizations: improve the users hosting operations page with search, stable sorting, bot filtering, and real configured bot data
ops: add Good/Bad feedback from the message-processing drawer, including Batch ID write-through to Feishu
make feedback success and failure states much more visible, including backend error details
refine pending release notes and deploy notification markdown
